message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title 七並ベシーケンス図（一周）ver.3

participant "App" as App
participant "Game" as Game
participant "Player" as Player
participant "View" as View
participant "TableView" as TableView
participant "PlayersListView" as PlayersListView

App -> Game: startRound()
activate Game
Game -> Player: startTurn()
activate Player
box "ターン進行" #LightGray
end box
deactivate Player
Game -> Player: [playersList.inPlayを回す]
activate Player
box "ターン終了" #LightGray
end box
deactivate Player
Game -> View: render(playersList,table)
activate View
View -> TableView: render(table)
activate TableView
deactivate TableView
View -> PlayersListView: render(playersList)
activate PlayersListView
deactivate PlayersListView
deactivate View
Game -> Game: cleanUpPlayersList()
deactivate Game
App -> Game: isEnd()
activate Game
Game --> App: boolean
deactivate Game
alt [true]
    App -> Game: endGame()
else [false]
    App -> Game: startRound()
end

@enduml
```
